claim: ➡Prompt Engineering = Writing text msg to LLM. Include info on role, examples, constraints to get better results. 📜Prompt: "Find the best restaurant in India" can give results that are not very helpful to you. 📜Refined: "You are a travel expert[Role]. Find restaurants similar to Namaste[Example]. Price per dish less than 500 INR[Constraint]" ➡Context Engineering = PE(LLM) + Memory(preferences) + RAG(relevance) + StateManagement(step by step guidance).
